title: Monitoring in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger monitoring in practice judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Monitoring in Practice is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Monitoring in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good monitoring in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Monitoring in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
